lane.title: 05 PiSignage
lane.last_task: Initialize PiSignage lane and verify TV upload packet
lane.last_summary: Read lane memory/control graph/unified context/TV history and verified current HE TV choreography state. Source-of-truth is hamza-express-site ops/tv-mission-control/choreography/preview-data.json generated 2026-05-18 with 7 groups, 28 playlists, 113 listed assets and 28 contact sheets. Old JSON source_root points to Desktop, now missing after cleanup; relocated upload packet exists at /Users/nihaf/Documents/2026-05_Working-Files/Creative/HamzaExpress_TV_Copies_2026-05-16/_ORGANIZED_BY_TIMESLOT. All 113 listed files are present there; dimension audit checked 100 files as 1920x1080 with zero mismatches, while 13 PNGs need re-export/repair/probe review before any upload because image probes failed or hung. Live choreography page HTTP 200; no PiSignage/API/screen mutation performed.
lane.next_action: Before playlist mutation, repair or re-export the 13 probe-failing PNGs, then verify live PiSignage player/group state for the exact target screen: 7 V2 choreography groups versus legacy 6-TV fleet registry, confirm outdoor facade H2 assignment, and prepare rollback to previous playlists/groups before upload.
lane.mutation_status: No PiSignage playlist, asset upload, repo, Cloudflare, Odoo, ad, WABA, aggregator, or screen mutation. Read-only lane initialization plus local asset/location/dimension verification only.
